description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tmaier/docker-compose:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: `docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml pull`, `docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml up --build -d`, `docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml exec -T api bundle exec rake test`, and `docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml run app`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
